textByHashes.681d961e2c24fb69d06f0759a8a52c87403a95e0: Because nobody can go in the Arboretum.
textByHashes.771536f01327dbf6ed3cebb294aab406cab2fff4: Clearly. Well Vampyre, you're wrong. No one can go in the Arboretum, by order of the Drakan family themselves.
textByHashes.f173eecd8b817ce3226ab22227ca1102a54604e0: Why do you want to go in, anyway?
textByHashes.97f9dc657128564bfc7609a06a447420a540cfa4: No, but I have a job to do.
textByHashes.6db51371de04453e003708ca3d997135da070256: I have no need for your money.
textByHashes.be9914b35aaf4cc68f889055e4dd16819fc7dd90: Eugh, fine! There's something I need doing. Get it done for me and I'll grant you access.
textByHashes.fa9f064f3f281e554b85fc22236d33d09c3194db: There's a juvinate who was meant to deliver something to me. He hasn't shown up. Find him and tell him that Desmodus Lasiurus is getting impatient.
textByHashes.b10c73bb7830aae2707f44372b626dce559276aa: Some slaves. You heard of Gadderanks? He was some human that Vanstrom used to help collect blood tithes.
textByHashes.24b1ea733fbd7a2a62146d19b5d1de55d2295bf2: Well, he went and got himself killed by the Myreque. Vanstrom owed me a favour so he agreed to let me have his wife and child.
textByHashes.c1c2bf39252da3e8ff1c66e38ddc707ecaeca259: Good. Mordan Nikazsi is the juvinate you're looking for. He'll be somewhere in the lowest tier of the city. Now, get lost!
textByHashes.4890c054b2dd9a28050d0bc9e4cf30e9e626671e: Why are you here then? He'll be somewhere in the lowest tier of the city. Go find him!
textByHashes.b73e1547e345caa02902441cdd8a0215eb8adbbc: That filthy wretch! I'll have him killed for this! Go find my slaves and bring them to me!
textByHashes.47644c6420ff7bd9029972cc2018288ad75f985e: Have you sorted my slaves out?
textByHashes.6ec55eb46c0000c34d58cc33234c738eff05805d: Good. Maybe you're not as useless as you look.
textByHashes.9697a9234032d1de3c4643215a9d73a8ea55911d: Yes. Just don't tell anyone I let you in.
